settings.heading: Stress Relief Attars & Calming Fragrance Sprays
settings.subheading: Discover calming attars, therapeutic perfume oils, and relaxing fragrance sprays crafted to ease stress, quiet the mind, and create a peaceful atmosphere for sleep, meditation, yoga, and emotional balance.
settings.supporting_text: Made with soothing floral, woody, herbal, and Ayurvedic-inspired fragrance notes for everyday relaxation and mindful living.

settings.section_title: How to Use Stress Relief Attars
settings.tips_heading: Best Times to Use Stress Relief Attars
settings.tips_lead: From morning grounding to sleep preparation, our calming attars and natural aromatherapy perfume oils support nervous-system relaxation, meditation fragrance rituals, and emotional balance—so you can reach for luxury attars attuned to how you live, work, and restore.

settings.title: Morning Grounding
settings.text: Begin the day with calming attars on pulse points or fabric to steady cortisol rhythms, soften morning anxiety, and set a mindful fragrance tone before screens and demands accelerate.

settings.title: Work Stress & Mental Fatigue
settings.text: During intense focus, a trace of calming attar on pulse points can reduce sensory fatigue, soften anxiety relief fragrance into your workspace, and restore a steadier emotional environment through long hours of concentration.

settings.title: Before Sleep
settings.text: Layer sleep fragrance oils on pulse points, pillow edges, or bedding ten minutes before rest. Woody-floral notes signal the nervous system to downshift, supporting attar for relaxation and a slower transition into restorative sleep.

settings.title: Meditation & Breathwork
settings.text: Place meditation fragrance near your mat or inhale from palms between rounds. Natural calming perfume oils deepen breath cadence, quiet mental chatter, and extend mindfulness support without overpowering the senses.

settings.title: Yoga & Nervous System Relaxation
settings.text: A whisper of attar before asana helps parasympathetic tone rise—supporting slower movement, softer jaw and shoulders, and nervous system balance as luxury attars become part of your embodied practice.

settings.title: Emotional Reset & Calmness
settings.text: When emotions spike, pause for three slow breaths after applying attar to the sternum or wrists. Aromatherapy perfume oils can interrupt stress loops, invite compassion, and return you to a grounded, emotionally intelligent baseline.
